directors.name: Lamberto Andreotti
directors.bio_summary: Retired Chair and Chief Executive Officer of Bristol-Myers Squibb. Serves as Chair of the Nomination and Governance Committee. Currently serves on 1 other public board.

directors.name: James C. Collins, Jr.
directors.bio_summary: Chief Executive Officer of Corteva, Inc. Currently serves on no other public boards.

directors.name: Klaus A. Engel, Ph.D.
directors.bio_summary: Retired Chief Executive Officer of Evonik Industries. Currently serves on no other public boards.

directors.name: David C. Everitt
directors.bio_summary: Retired Agricultural and Turf Division President of Deere & Company. Currently serves on 3 other public boards.

directors.name: Janet P. Giesselman
directors.bio_summary: Retired President and General Manager of Dow Oil & Gas. Currently serves on 4 other public boards.

directors.name: Karen H. Grimes
directors.bio_summary: Retired Senior Managing Director and Partner at Wellington Management. Currently serves on 2 other public boards.

directors.name: Michael O. Johanns
directors.bio_summary: Retired U.S. Senator and U.S. Secretary of Agriculture. Currently serves on 1 other public board.

directors.name: Rebecca B. Liebert, Ph.D.
directors.bio_summary: Executive Vice President at PPG Industries, Inc. Serves as Chair of the Audit Committee. Currently serves on no other public boards.

directors.name: Marcos M. Lutz
directors.bio_summary: Retired Chief Executive Officer of Cosan Limited. Currently serves on 1 other public board.

directors.bio_summary: Executive Vice President and Chief Product Officer at Ivanti, Inc. Currently serves on 1 other public board.

directors.name: Gregory R. Page
directors.bio_summary: Retired Chair and Chief Executive Officer of Cargill, Incorporated. Serves as Chair of the People and Compensation Committee. Currently serves on 3 other public boards.

directors.bio_summary: Retired Executive Vice President and Chief Strategy Officer of Monsanto Company. Currently serves on 2 other public boards.

directors.name: Patrick J. Ward
directors.bio_summary: Retired Chief Financial Officer of Cummins Inc. Serves as Chair of the Sustainability, Safety & Innovation Committee. Currently serves on no other public boards.

extraction_notes: Tenure years on board were not explicitly stated in the provided text; average tenure of 1.3 years is noted for the slate but individual tenures are not given. Committee chair roles were inferred from the 'C' designations in the summary table (Andreotti=Nomination and Governance Chair, Liebert=Audit Chair, Page=People and Compensation Chair, Ward=Sustainability/Safety/Innovation Chair).
